_note: Mini ScreenSpot smoke fixtures. Synthesised UI screenshots (1280x800) with synthetic widget bboxes; no upstream pixels checked in. Each sample asks the model to click a labelled UI element; bbox is ground truth in pixel coords [x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max].

samples.instruction: Click the search button in the top toolbar
Click the username field on the login form
Tap the camera icon in the bottom navigation bar
Click the close (x) button on the dialog
